_comment: Manually updated before each IPL match day. Key = YYYY-MM-DD (IST date of the match). Update the night before or early morning when official squad announcements drop.
_impact: Each confirmed absence applies a -4% win probability penalty to that team, capped at -8% total. Only list confirmed absences — not speculative ones.
_howto: Use the full player name as shown on Cricbuzz. Remove past dates to keep file tidy. Leave team list empty [] if no known absences.
